zh.lifeSummary: 當Andrew Jarpenville of Bushey於1235年出生在英國賀特福爾布時，他的父親Geoffrey II Jarpenville26歲，母親Alice25歲。他和Matilda de Sydenham至少有1個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1316年在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾尼德武德享年81歲。

nameMeanings.name: Andrew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the Greek name Andreas, a short form of any of various compound names derived from andr- ‘man, warrior’. In the New Testament this is the name of the first disciple to be called by Jesus. After the Resurrection, St Andrew preached in Asia Minor and Greece. He is traditionally believed to have been crucified at Patras in Achaia. He was one of the most popular saints of the Middle Ages and was adopted as the patron of Scotland, Russia, and Greece. It has long been among the most popular boys' names in the English-speaking world, especially in Scotland. Its popularity in England was further enhanced by its use as a British royal name for Prince Andrew ( b. 1960 ), the Duke of York.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Andrew Jarpenville of Bushey was born in 1235, in Bushey, Hertfordshire, England, his father, Geoffrey II Jarpenville, was 26 and his mother, Alice, was 25. He had at least 1 son and 3 daughters with Matilda de Sydenham. He died in 1316, in Needwood, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 81.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Andrew Jarpenville of Bushey est né en 1235, à Bushey, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Geoffrey II Jarpenville, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Alice, avait 25 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles avec Matilda de Sydenham. Il est décédé en 1316, à Needwood, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 81 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Andrew Jarpenville of Bushey(이)가 1235년 영국 허트퍼드실르 부셰이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Geoffrey II Jarpenville(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Matilda de Sydenham(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1316년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 니드우드에서 81세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Andrew Jarpenville of Bushey родился в 1235 г. в местности буши, хиртфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Geoffrey II Jarpenville было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice, 25. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери от Matilda de Sydenham. Он умер в 1316 г. в местности нидвуд, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 81 год.
